content:
Formatting
* Please study the formatting syntax on this page: https://www.codingame.com/playgrounds/40701/help-center/statement , and format your statement properly as described in the points below.

Goal
* There aren't "several" variables in each case. There is only one variable. Please correct the wording.

* Please mention the value of the variable starts at {{0}}.

* Please change "rules" and "changes" to "operations" for consistency with the Input and Output sections.

* Please mention that changes may be either addition ({{+}}) or subtraction ({{-}}).

Input
* Please change "The first line contains an" to "<<Line 1>>: An".

* Please change "The next n lines each" to "<<Next [[n]] lines: Each".

* Please format "n" and "x" as [[variables]].

* Please format "+" and "-" as {{constants}}.

Constraints
* Please format "n" and "x" as [[variables]].

* Please remove the third line as it just repeats the input description.

* Please change 1000 to 10 as [[n]] never exceeds 10.

Cases
* Test 4 and Validator 4:
  • Please change 6 to 8 and add "+0" and "-0" as two of the operations.
  
  • Please change some of the "0" digits to digits unused in the case (i.e. 6, 7, 8 and 9 in both cases, and additionally 3 and 4 in Validator 4). Try to use random integers (so e.g. instead of -56789 you may use -68975 instead).

Thanks.
It's all right. I'll review your clash again if you let me know you've modified it. Thanks.
Thanks! I've applied all the requested changes
Looks good to me. Thank you. 🙂
